description.str: A canister grenade filled with a variety of chemicals.

//: intended fields: use_action (transform to primed grenade); name; description

description: This grenade has had its pin removed and will shortly be expelling highly toxic gas.

use_action.message: You've already pulled the pin, try throwing it instead.
use_action.name: Pull pin

//: intended fields: revert_to active grenade; name

description: This grenade has had its pin pulled and is now expelling highly toxic gas.

//: Based on the M73A riot grenade
description: A canister grenade filled with noxious irritant.  Use this item to pull the pin and start the fuse, turning it into an active tear gas grenade.  In five seconds it will begin to expel a highly toxic gas for some time.  This gas damages and slows those who enter it, as well as obscuring vision and scent.

use_action.msg: You pull the pin on the %s.

description: This tear gas grenade has had its pin removed and will shortly be expelling highly noxious gas.
This tear gas grenade has had its pin removed and is expelling highly noxious gas.

A canister grenade filled with a variety of pyrotechnic chemicals.  Use this item to pull the pin and start the fuse, turning it into an active smoke bomb.  Five seconds after you do that, it will begin to expel a thick white smoke.  This smoke will obscure vision and scent, and choke out those who enter it.

use_action.msg: You pull the pin on the %s.

description: This smoke bomb has had its pin removed and will shortly be expelling thick smoke.
This smoke bomb has had its pin removed and is expelling thick smoke.

A canister grenade filled with insecticidal solution.  Use this item to pull the pin and start the fuse, turning it into an active insecticidal grenade.  In five seconds it will begin to expel a volatile gas that is highly toxic to insect life forms.

use_action.msg: You pull the pin on the %s.

description: A makeshift canister grenade filled with insecticidal solution.  Use this item to pull the pin and start the fuse, turning it into an active insecticidal grenade.  In five seconds it will begin to expel a volatile gas that is highly toxic to insect life forms.

use_action.msg: You pull the pin on the %s.

description: A canister grenade filled with fungicidal solution.  Use this item to pull the pin and start the fuse, turning it into an active fungicidal grenade.  In five seconds it will begin to expel a volatile gas that is highly toxic to fungal life forms.

use_action.msg: You pull the pin on the %s.

description: This fungicidal bomb has had its pin removed and is (or will shortly be) expelling highly toxic gas.

A makeshift canister grenade filled with fungicidal solution.  Use this item to pull the pin and start the fuse, turning it into an active fungicidal grenade.  In five seconds it will begin to expel a volatile gas that is highly toxic to fungal life forms.

use_action.msg: You pull the pin on the %s.

description: This makeshift fungicidal bomb has had its pin removed and is (or will shortly be) expelling highly toxic gas.

A crude gas bomb made using household chemicals.  Use this item to arm it.  In three seconds it will begin to expel a highly toxic gas for a short time.  This gas poisons those exposed to it, in addition to obscuring vision and scent.

use_action.msg: You pull the pin on the %s.

description: This homemade canister of poison gas has been unsealed, and is (or will shortly be) expelling highly toxic gas.  You should consider getting rid of it soon.

use_action.message: You've already pulled the pin, try throwing it instead.
use_action.name: Pull pin
